name: Monstera Deliciosa
description: The Swiss Cheese Plant is famous for its natural leaf-holes. A stunning statement piece for any room.

name: Fiddle Leaf Fig
description: Features very large, heavily veined, violin-shaped leaves. Needs bright, indirect light to thrive.

name: Snake Plant Laurentii
description: One of the most tolerant plants out there, perfect for beginners. Known for its air-purifying qualities.

name: Golden Pothos
description: A trailing vine that's eager to grow. Perfect for high shelves or hanging baskets.

name: ZZ Plant
description: Characterized by its dark, shiny, waxy green leaves. Extremely drought tolerant.

name: Calathea Orbifolia
description: Known for its oversized leaves with striking silver stripes. Requires high humidity to thrive.

name: Bird of Paradise
description: Bring tropical flair indoors with these broad, banana-like leaves. Thrives in bright sunlight.

name: Peace Lily
description: An elegant plant with white, hood-like flowers. Great at breaking down toxic indoor gases.

name: Soft Leaf Philodendron
description: Known for its large, heart-shaped leaves that bring a velvety texture to any indoor space.

name: Rubber Tree
description: Sturdy and dramatic with glossy, burgundy-green leaves. Can grow very tall indoors.

name: Aloe Vera
description: A charming succulent with thick, fleshy leaves. Known for its soothing gel.

name: Spider Plant
description: A fast-growing plant that looks great in hanging baskets. Very adaptable and easy to care for.

name: Jade Plant
description: A beautiful succulent with tree-like branches. Symbolizes good luck and prosperity.

name: Pilea Peperomioides
description: Also known as the Chinese Money Plant. Famous for its round, coin-shaped leaves.

name: Majesty Palm
description: A classic indoor palm tree that adds a lush, tropical feel to any bright room.

name: Cast Iron Plant
description: Incredibly resilient and able to survive in very low light. Perfect for dark corners.

name: English Ivy
description: A beautiful trailing plant that can cascade down shelves or be trained to climb.

name: Parlor Palm
description: A popular indoor palm that easily adapts to lower light and adds a vintage elegance.
